states.description: Android app drawer listing installed apps
Simple Draw Pro main drawing canvas

visual_cues: dropdown list with Open file, Change background color, Print, Settings, About
Filename input field with default image_<timestamp>

states.description: Android system file picker for save destination
visual_cues: hamburger menu, new folder icon, view toggle, three-dot menu

states.description: Navigation drawer in system file picker
visual_cues: list of storage locations like Downloads, SDCARD, device storage name

states.description: Dialog for naming a new folder
Sort options bottom sheet in file picker
visual_cues: radio list: File name, Modified (newest/oldest), Size, Type

states.description: Change background color dialog from menu
Turn on Nearby Share bottom sheet
Device visibility configuration for Nearby Share

visual_cues: Copies, Paper size, Color, Orientation fields

strategies.name: SAVE_DRAWING_WITH_NAME_FORMAT
steps: click save icon (floppy disk) in top toolbar
in save_as_dialog select desired format radio (.png/.svg/.jpg)
clear default filename via long_press field -> Select all, or long_press backspace
type desired filename
click OK
in system_file_picker navigate to target folder (use hamburger -> storage root if needed)
click SAVE (bottom-right)
strategies.success_signal: Returns to canvas_main; optional toast 'File saved successfully'
strategies.fallback: If filename appended instead of replaced, long_press field and pick Select all, then type

strategies.name: CREATE_NEW_FOLDER_AND_SAVE
steps: click new folder icon (top-right)
type folder name in new_folder_dialog and confirm
verify breadcrumb shows new folder
click SAVE
strategies.success_signal: Save dialog closes, returns to canvas_main
strategies.fallback: If wrong parent, use hamburger or breadcrumb to navigate up

strategies.name: CHANGE_VIEW_OR_SORT_IN_PICKER
steps: click view toggle icon to switch list/grid
click three-dot menu -> Sort by...
select desired sort option from bottom sheet
strategies.success_signal: View layout changes / sort order applied

strategies.name: FILL_CANVAS_WITH_COLOR
steps: optionally click color square and pick/enter hex in color_picker_dialog, then OK
click paint bucket icon to activate fill tool
tap anywhere on canvas to flood fill
strategies.fallback: If eraser was chosen by mistake, re-click paint bucket

strategies.name: SET_HEX_COLOR
steps: long_press hex input to select existing text
type new 6-digit hex code (e.g., 00FF00)
click OK
strategies.success_signal: Preview swatch shows the new color; current color square updates
strategies.fallback: If only partial clearing, click at end of field then backspace remaining chars

strategies.name: SHARE_VIA_MESSAGES_OR_NEARBY
steps: click share icon in top toolbar
in share_sheet select Messages or Nearby
for Messages: start new chat, type recipient, send
for Nearby: configure Device visibility (Everyone) then Turn on
strategies.success_signal: Recipient field populated/message sent or 'Looking for nearby devices' shown
strategies.fallback: Set Messages as default SMS app if prompted

strategies.name: PRINT_OR_SAVE_AS_PDF
steps: click three-dot menu -> Print
tap 'Select a printer' and choose 'Save as PDF'
configure Paper size, Orientation, Color, Copies
tap PDF/print button, then SAVE in file picker
strategies.success_signal: Returns to canvas after PDF saved
strategies.fallback: If settings greyed out, ensure a printer (or Save as PDF) is selected first

strategies.name: CLEAR_CANVAS_AND_SET_TOOL
steps: click trash icon to clear
click desired tool (pen/eraser/paint bucket)
adjust thickness via bottom slider (tap end for min/max)
strategies.success_signal: Canvas blank, tool icon highlighted, slider at desired position
strategies.fallback: If swiping the slider draws on canvas, tap the slider track endpoint instead

dead_ends.failed_action: type new filename without clearing default
dead_ends.note: Typed text gets appended to default; must long_press field and Select all or use long_press backspace first

dead_ends.failed_action: repeated single backspace with cursor at start of field
dead_ends.note: Backspace does nothing when cursor is at position 0; click at end of text first

dead_ends.failed_action: change copies/color/orientation before selecting a printer
dead_ends.note: Fields are disabled until a printer (e.g., Save as PDF) is chosen
Swipe may register as a drawing stroke on canvas; tap slider endpoint instead

dead_ends.failed_action: tap Messages without setting it as default SMS app
dead_ends.note: System dialog blocks until Messages is selected and Set as default confirmed
App icon is labeled 'Draw'; searching the full name may not match

categories.name: EXPORT_ARTIFACT_WITH_NAME_AND_FORMAT
categories.precondition: Editor open with content ready to export
abstract_steps: Invoke export/save action from primary toolbar
Select desired output format in export dialog
Clear default filename (select-all or long-press delete)
Confirm dialog to advance to destination picker
failure_modes: Typing appends to default name instead of replacing it
Backspace ineffective when cursor at start of field
Confirming too early before destination/format are correct
verification_checklist: Filename field shows exact requested name
Editor returns to main view or success toast appears

categories.name: CREATE_CONTAINER_IN_PICKER
categories.precondition: Inside a system file/folder picker at parent location
abstract_steps: Confirm to create and auto-enter container
Verify breadcrumb shows the new container
failure_modes: Creating container at wrong parent path
Confirming save before entering the new container
verification_checklist: Container is the active save location before final confirmation

categories.name: CONFIGURE_VIEW_OR_SORT
categories.precondition: Inside a list/grid presenting items with view controls
abstract_steps: Toggle view layout via dedicated icon if needed
Open overflow menu and choose sort option

categories.name: APPLY_COLOR_BY_HEX
verification_checklist: Hex field shows exact requested code

categories.name: APPLY_TOOL_AND_PARAMETER
categories.precondition: Editor with tool palette and parameter slider visible
abstract_steps: Tap desired tool icon to activate it
Adjust parameter slider by tapping at desired position (avoid swiping across canvas area)
failure_modes: Wrong tool remains active after color/format changes
verification_checklist: Tool icon is highlighted as active
Slider thumb sits at intended position

categories.name: SHARE_TO_EXTERNAL_APP
categories.precondition: Editor with content; system share entry point available
abstract_steps: Pick target app from system share sheet
Handle any default-app or permission prompts
failure_modes: Target app requires being set as default before use
Picking wrong icon in share sheet

categories.name: PRINT_OR_EXPORT_PDF
categories.precondition: Editor with print entry in overflow menu
abstract_steps: Open overflow menu and choose print
Select a printer destination (real or virtual PDF)
Adjust paper size, orientation, color, copies
failure_modes: Print settings disabled until printer selected
Virtual PDF printer caps copies to 1
verification_checklist: All requested print parameters are reflected in preview
Output file or job is produced

categories.name: QUERY_INFO_FROM_DIALOG
categories.precondition: Need to read a static value from a UI element
failure_modes: Modifying state unnecessarily and triggering side effects

categories.name: LAUNCH_APP_FROM_LAUNCHER
abstract_steps: Locate app by icon (label may differ from full product name)
failure_modes: Missing app because actual label differs from product name
